title: Observability polish — Audit view chip coverage audit
predecessor: M35-T2 shipped 2026-04-19 (commit 1108247 — cross-milestone integration E2E; NEW apps/desktop/e2e/phase-5-integration.spec.ts stitches M28→M34 in one session; spec runtime 3.7s under ≤15s budget; 11 spec files / 12 Playwright cases green in 40.6s; 1134 unit / 0 lint errors / 24 warnings / typecheck clean). M35-T1 shipped 2026-04-19 (commit b68d09b — performance defaults + clamp audit; all 10 Phase 5 settings clamps HELD on llama3.1:8b evidence; +4 unit tests 1130 → 1134). M35-T0 shipped 2026-04-19 (commit da4ce1f — plan doc). M34 COMPLETE shipped 2026-04-18 (commits f1180cf + 893f8fd + af643ec).
goal: Extend AuditView chip coverage to the 9 Phase 5 event types not yet chipped: rag.index.indexed, rag.index.reindexed, rag.index.removed, command.executed, agent.step, agentic.completed, agentic.failed, copilot.analyzed, copilot.insight, copilot.dismissed, copilot.expired. (Note: rag.index.* expands to indexed/reindexed/removed per M28/M29 wire contract — confirm the exact emitted literal strings with a grep of rag-indexer.ts before authoring the chip map.) Author matching payload-aware row-summary formatters so each event's audit row surfaces the most useful fact (e.g. agent.step → step.kind + runId slice; copilot.analyzed → reason + insightsPersisted count; task.delegated → assigneeId + score). Match the existing chip a11y contract exactly: semantic color paired with text label (never color-only), visible chip focus ring, aria-label containing the literal event-type name. +3 unit tests pinning chip render output for representative rows (rag.index.indexed / agent.step / copilot.analyzed).
acceptance: audit-event-chip.tsx gains entries for all 9 Phase 5 event types with semantic color + text label (never color-only) + visible focus ring + aria-label with event type literal.

audit-view.tsx row-summary formatter extended so each Phase 5 event renders its most useful payload field (agent.step → step.kind; copilot.analyzed → reason + counts; task.delegated → assigneeId + score; invariant: summary is always ≤140 chars).
audit-event-chip.test.tsx adds 3 unit tests (rag.index.indexed / agent.step / copilot.analyzed) asserting chip text, color class, aria-label, and keyboard focus ring.

No existing chip coverage regressed (M32 T6 planner chips for plan.proposed / plan.approved / task.delegated / task.escalated / review.requested / review.completed all still render per their frozen test).
Zero new IPC / bus events / migrations. Renderer-only edits.
Full test suite green after Node ABI rebuild: pnpm test → 1137 / 1137 (1134 + 3). pnpm typecheck clean. pnpm lint 0 errors / ≤24 warnings.
E2E suite unchanged: pnpm -F @team-x/desktop test:e2e → 12 cases / 11 spec files in ≤42s (T3 is renderer-only; no spec changes).
Atomic commit: feat(m35): M35 T3 — audit view chips for Phase 5 events.

Ledger commit: chore(loki): M35 T3 — commit ledger (<sha>) — roll orchestrator.json tasksCompleted 3 → 4, update pending.json T3 status pending → shipped, overwrite current-task.json to M35-T4 (Phase 5 retrospective doc), prepend M35 T3 DONE subsection to .loki/CONTINUITY.md.
carryForward: M35 T2 closed: phase-5-integration.spec.ts landed at 495 lines / 3.7s runtime / 4× budget headroom. Zero new canned-seam entries — reused 'what is my team doing right now' (M31 T8) + 'decompose the frontend redesign into tickets' (M32 T8) + 'strategia-x' CANNED_COPILOT_TABLE fixture (M33 T8) + __ECHO_AGENT__: sentinel (M31 tier-1 path).

Architectural seams (canned quartet / {rows, truncated} envelope / data-* selectors / pause-aware providerRouter wrapper / AbortController stop / is_system filter-sweep / atomic + ledger cadence / ABI rebuild dance / invariant #11) unchanged — all reinforced by the integration spec.
Phase 5 badge is FROZEN at 'Phase 5' through v1.1.0 release. M35 T8 pins the literal string in a unit test. Phase 6 work is the next session after M35 T10.
ABI state at start of T3: Electron (post M35 T2 Playwright). Before running vitest, rebuild for Node ABI: cd node_modules/.pnpm/better-sqlite3@11.10.0/node_modules/better-sqlite3 && npm run install.

Bus-event emitter sources for the 9 new chips (grep these before authoring chip keys): rag-indexer.ts (rag.index.indexed / rag.index.reindexed / rag.index.removed); command-service.ts (command.executed); agentic-loop-service.ts (agent.step / agentic.completed / agentic.failed); copilot-analyzer-service.ts (copilot.analyzed / copilot.insight / copilot.expired); copilot-handlers.ts (copilot.dismissed). Cross-reference CLAUDE.md Phase 5 bus-event table to confirm wire contract.

Chip color palette (from existing M32 T6 conventions): sky = delegation/task; emerald = ticket-created/completed; amber = write-side/proposed; rose = escalated/failed; blue = info/analyzed; gray = dismissed/expired. Pick per semantics, never for visual variety — paired text label carries the actual meaning per a11y invariant.
